texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: The Cradle Hotel -0asis in The Desert .
texts.text: The Cradle Hotel -0asis in The Desert .

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nestled in the heart of Turkana, Kenya, The Cradle Hotel offers a serene escape with a perfect blend of modern comfort and rich cultural heritage. Known for its warm hospitality and stunning views, the hotel is an ideal destination for both leisure and business travellers.
texts.text: Nestled in the heart of Turkana, Kenya, The Cradle Hotel offers a serene escape with a perfect blend of modern comfort and rich cultural heritage. Known for its warm hospitality and stunning views, the hotel is an ideal destination for both leisure and business travellers.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Guests can enjoy well-appointed rooms, a tranquil ambiance, and amenities tailored to create a memorable  stay.  From  savouring  delicious  local  and  international  cuisine  at  our  restaurant  to exploring Turkana's vibrant landscapes and cultural gems, The Cradle Hotel promises an experience like no other.
texts.text: Guests can enjoy well-appointed rooms, a tranquil ambiance, and amenities tailored to create a memorable  stay.  From  savouring  delicious  local  and  international  cuisine  at  our  restaurant  to exploring Turkana's vibrant landscapes and cultural gems, The Cradle Hotel promises an experience like no other.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Whether you're here for relaxation, adventure, or business, your journey begins at The Cradlewhere every guest is family.
texts.text: Whether you're here for relaxation, adventure, or business, your journey begins at The Cradlewhere every guest is family.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: LOCATION
texts.text: LOCATION

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cradle Hotel is located along Kerio Road in Lodwar, Turkana County, just 5 km from Lodwar Airport. Set on a serene 16-acre property, the hotel offers a peaceful retreat with easy access to key attractions in the region. Its strategic location makes it ideal for both business and leisure travelers exploring Turkana.
texts.text: Cradle Hotel is located along Kerio Road in Lodwar, Turkana County, just 5 km from Lodwar Airport. Set on a serene 16-acre property, the hotel offers a peaceful retreat with easy access to key attractions in the region. Its strategic location makes it ideal for both business and leisure travelers exploring Turkana.

texts.orig: ACCOMMODATION
texts.text: ACCOMMODATION

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cradle Hotel offers a blend of comfort, elegance, and modern convenience in the heart of Turkana. We proudly feature 16 Executive Rooms, 42 Standard Rooms A Modern Presidential Suite and a Lounge, thoughtfully designed to cater to both business and leisure travellers.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ACTIVITIES
texts.text: ACTIVITIES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Turkana is a region rich in culture, history, and natural beauty, offering visitors a variety of unforgettable experiences. Explore the vast Lake Turkana and its volcanic wonder, Central Island National Park, or unwind at the scenic Eliye Springs. Dive into local culture with tours of traditional Turkana villages and attend the vibrant Tobong'u Lore Cultural Fe stival. History and archaeology enthusiasts can visit the site of the famous Turkana Boy discovery and the renowned Turkana Basin Institute, a hub for research on human origins. Adventurous travelers can enjoy desert drives, camel rides, and visits to unique landmarks like the Wadachi Pyramid and the Christ the Redeemer Monument perched above Lodwar, which offers sweeping views of the town and spiritual reflection. Additional highlights include the historic Catholic Mission in Lodwar and opportunities for fishing, nature walks, and cultural storytelling.
texts.text: Turkana is a region rich in culture, history, and natural beauty, offering visitors a variety of unforgettable experiences. Explore the vast Lake Turkana and its volcanic wonder, Central Island National Park, or unwind at the scenic Eliye Springs. Dive into local culture with tours of traditional Turkana villages and attend the vibrant Tobong'u Lore Cultural Fe stival. History and archaeology enthusiasts can visit the site of the famous Turkana Boy discovery and the renowned Turkana Basin Institute, a hub for research on human origins. Adventurous travelers can enjoy desert drives, camel rides, and visits to unique landmarks like the Wadachi Pyramid and the Christ the Redeemer Monument perched above Lodwar, which offers sweeping views of the town and spiritual reflection. Additional highlights include the historic Catholic Mission in Lodwar and opportunities for fishing, nature walks, and cultural storytelling.
